report_ready_summary.short_summary: Across 17 total observations, the DAC official enode list showed 28 unique enodes and 28 unique IPs. The observed target port remained within [28657]. Enode count ranged from 7 to 15, with an average of 12.12.
report_ready_summary.manual_to_automated_context: The dataset combines partial manual observations from the pre-watcher period with automated GitHub Actions snapshots after the watcher was deployed.
report_ready_summary.technical_value: This summary provides a structured basis for analyzing bootstrap peer rotation, persistent official enodes, IP recurrence, provider hints, ASN hints, and possible infrastructure maturation patterns.
